mapper.sql: id, name, file_name, storage_path, size_bytes, md5, effective_at, expire_at, applicant, status, imported_at
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO deploy_license (id, name, file_name, storage_path, size_bytes, md5, effective_at, expire_at, applicant, status, imported_at) VALUES (#{id}, #{name}, #{fileName}, #{storagePath}, #{sizeBytes}, #{md5}, #{effectiveAt}, #{expireAt}, #{applicant}, #{status}, #{importedAt})
